TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Bedell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 6, Bob Bedell, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2015) qnxan nya Bob Bedell htagan beh sa Angeles California. raral ga mqwas biru mnaki Bell Gardens gocyu pqwasan biru. raral ga mnaki Stanford hopa pqwasan biru sinsiy pcbaq biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ОІoОІ ОІe*ell s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa. kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj *, ОІoОІ ОІe*ell, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. (mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) qnxan nja ОІoОІ ОІe*ell Д§taЙЈan ОІeД§ s~Й•a aЕӢeles~Й• КҰ~КЁali*ornia. raral ЙЈa mqwas~Й• ОІiru mnaki ОІell ЙЈar*ens~Й• ЙЈoКҰ~КЁju pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. raral ЙЈa mnaki s~Й•tan*or* Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru s~Й•ins~Й•ij pКҰ~КЁОІaq ОІiru. КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
S.FORM: Bob Bedell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 6, Bob Bedell, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2015) qnxan nya Bob Bedell htagan beh sa Angeles California. raral ga mqwas biru mnaki Bell Gardens gocyu pqwasan biru. raral ga mnaki Stanford hopa pqwasan biru sinsiy pcbaq biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) qnxan nja ОІoОІ ОІe*ell Д§taЙЈan ОІeД§ s~Й•a aЕӢeles~Й• КҰ~КЁali*ornia. raral ЙЈa mqwas~Й• ОІiru mnaki ОІell ЙЈar*ens~Й• ЙЈoКҰ~КЁju pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. raral ЙЈa mnaki s~Й•tan*or* Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru s~Й•ins~Й•ij pКҰ~КЁОІaq ОІiru.
